description: Provides custom message, srv and action types for psdk ros2 wrapper

fields.name: control_auth
fields.comment: 1->Has control authority 0->No control authority

FlightAnomaly.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
uint32 impact_in_air                     # 0: No impact,                      1: _impact happens in Air 
uint32 random_fly                       # 0: Normal,                         1: Randomly fly in GPS mode without stick input
uint32 height_ctrl_fail                  # 0: Height control normal,          1: Height control failed 
uint32 roll_pitch_ctrl_fail               # 0: Tilt control normal,            1: Tilt control failed 
uint32 yaw_ctrl_fail                     # 0: Yaw control normal,             1: Yaw control failed 
uint32 aircraft_is_falling              # 0: Aircraft is not falling,        1: Aircraft is falling 
uint32 strong_wind_level1               # 0: wind is under big wind level 1, 1: wind is stronger than  big wind level 1
uint32 strong_wind_level2               # 0: wind is under big wind level 2, 1: wind is stronger than  big wind level 2
uint32 compass_installation_error       # 0: Compass install right,          1: Compass install error 
uint32 imu_installation_error           # 0: IMU install right,              1: IMU install error 
uint32 esc_temperature_high             # 0: ESC temperature is normal,      1: ESC temperature is high 
uint32 at_least_one_esc_disconnected     # 0: No ESC disconnected,            1: At least one ESC is disconnected 
uint32 gps_yaw_error                    # 0: No GPS yaw error,               1: GPS yaw error 
uint32 reserved

fields.name: impact_in_air
fields.comment: 0: No impact,                      1: _impact happens in Air

fields.name: random_fly
fields.comment: 0: Normal,                         1: Randomly fly in GPS mode without stick input

fields.name: height_ctrl_fail
fields.comment: 0: Height control normal,          1: Height control failed

fields.name: roll_pitch_ctrl_fail
fields.comment: 0: Tilt control normal,            1: Tilt control failed

fields.name: yaw_ctrl_fail
fields.comment: 0: Yaw control normal,             1: Yaw control failed

fields.name: aircraft_is_falling
fields.comment: 0: Aircraft is not falling,        1: Aircraft is falling

fields.name: strong_wind_level1
fields.comment: 0: wind is under big wind level 1, 1: wind is stronger than  big wind level 1

fields.name: strong_wind_level2
fields.comment: 0: wind is under big wind level 2, 1: wind is stronger than  big wind level 2

fields.name: compass_installation_error
fields.comment: 0: Compass install right,          1: Compass install error

fields.name: imu_installation_error
fields.comment: 0: IMU install right,              1: IMU install error

fields.name: esc_temperature_high
fields.comment: 0: ESC temperature is normal,      1: ESC temperature is high

fields.name: at_least_one_esc_disconnected
fields.comment: 0: No ESC disconnected,            1: At least one ESC is disconnected

fields.name: gps_yaw_error
fields.comment: 0: No GPS yaw error,               1: GPS yaw error

uint8 FLIGHT_STATUS_ON_GROUND = 1
uint8 FLIGHT_STATUS_ON_AIR = 2

std_msgs/Header header  
uint8 flight_status

GPSDetails.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
float32 horizontal_dop                             # Horizontal dilution of precision, unit: 0.01, eg: 100 = 1.00, <1: ideal, 1-2: excellent, 2-5: good, 5-10: moderate, 10-20: fair, >20: poor.
float32 position_dop                               # Position dilution of precision, unit: 0.01, eg: 100 = 1.00, <1: ideal, 1-2: excellent, 2-5: good, 5-10: moderate, 10-20: fair, >20: poor.

uint16 GPS_FIX_STATE_NO_FIX = 0                    # GPS position has not been fixed. 
uint16 GPS_FIX_STATE_DEAD_RECKONING_ONLY = 1       # GPS position is dead reckoned only. 
uint16 GPS_FIX_STATE_2D_FIX = 2                    # The horizontal position with latitude/longitude (or northing/easting or X/Y) is fixed. 
uint16 GPS_FIX_STATE_3D_FIX = 3                    # The horizontal and vertical position with latitude/longitude/altitude (northing/easting/altitude or X/Y/Z) is fixed. 
uint16 GPS_FIX_STATE_GPS_PLUS_DEAD_RECKONING = 4   # Position is calculated by GPS and combined with dead reckoning. 
uint16 GPS_FIX_STATE_TIME_ONLY_FIX = 5             # Only time is fixed. 
float32 fix_state   

float32 vertical_accuracy                           # Vertical position accuracy (mm), the smaller, the better.
float32 horizontal_accuracy                         # Horizontal position accuracy (mm), the smaller, the better.
float32 speed_accuracy                              # Speed accuracy (cm/s), the smaller, the better.
uint32 num_gps_satellites_used                      # Number of GPS satellites used for fixing position.
uint32 num_glonass_satellites_used                  # Number of GLONASS satellites used for fixing position.
uint16 num_total_satellites_used                    # Total number of satellites used for fixing position.
uint16 gps_counter                                  # Accumulated times of sending GPS data.

fields.name: horizontal_dop
fields.comment: Horizontal dilution of precision, unit: 0.01, eg: 100 = 1.00, <1: ideal, 1-2: excellent, 2-5: good, 5-10: moderate, 10-20: fair, >20: poor.

fields.name: position_dop
fields.comment: Position dilution of precision, unit: 0.01, eg: 100 = 1.00, <1: ideal, 1-2: excellent, 2-5: good, 5-10: moderate, 10-20: fair, >20: poor.

fields.name: GPS_FIX_STATE_NO_FIX
fields.comment: GPS position has not been fixed.

fields.name: GPS_FIX_STATE_DEAD_RECKONING_ONLY
fields.comment: GPS position is dead reckoned only.

fields.name: GPS_FIX_STATE_2D_FIX
fields.comment: The horizontal position with latitude/longitude (or northing/easting or X/Y) is fixed.

fields.name: GPS_FIX_STATE_3D_FIX
fields.comment: The horizontal and vertical position with latitude/longitude/altitude (northing/easting/altitude or X/Y/Z) is fixed.

fields.name: GPS_FIX_STATE_GPS_PLUS_DEAD_RECKONING
fields.comment: Position is calculated by GPS and combined with dead reckoning.

fields.name: GPS_FIX_STATE_TIME_ONLY_FIX
fields.comment: Only time is fixed.

fields.name: vertical_accuracy
fields.comment: Vertical position accuracy (mm), the smaller, the better.

fields.name: horizontal_accuracy
fields.comment: Horizontal position accuracy (mm), the smaller, the better.

fields.name: speed_accuracy
fields.comment: Speed accuracy (cm/s), the smaller, the better.

fields.name: num_gps_satellites_used
fields.comment: Number of GPS satellites used for fixing position.

fields.name: num_glonass_satellites_used
fields.comment: Number of GLONASS satellites used for fixing position.

fields.name: num_total_satellites_used
fields.comment: Total number of satellites used for fixing position.

fields.name: gps_counter
fields.comment: Accumulated times of sending GPS data.

GimbalRotation.description: 1, /*!< Absolute angle rotation mode, represents rotating gimbal to specified angles in the ground coordinate. */
GimbalRotation.raw:
uint8 payload_index 1 # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint8 rotation_mode # see E_DjiGimbalRotationMode in dji_gimbal_manager.h 0 /*!< Incremental angle rotation mode, represents rotating gimbal specified angles based on current angles. */
                                                                        # 1, /*!< Absolute angle rotation mode, represents rotating gimbal to specified angles in the ground coordinate. */
                                                                        # 2  /*!< Speed rotation mode, specifies rotation speed of gimbal in the ground coordinate. */
float32 pitch # unit: radians
float32 roll  # unit: radians
float32 yaw   # unit: radians
float32 time  # /*!< Expect execution time of gimbal rotation, unit: second. */

fields.name: payload_index
fields.comment: see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h

fields.name: rotation_mode
fields.comment: see E_DjiGimbalRotationMode in dji_gimbal_manager.h 0 /*!< Incremental angle rotation mode, represents rotating gimbal specified angles based on current angles. */

fields.name: pitch
fields.comment: unit: radians

fields.name: roll
fields.comment: unit: radians

fields.name: yaw
fields.comment: unit: radians

fields.name: time
fields.comment: /*!< Expect execution time of gimbal rotation, unit: second. */

GimbalStatus.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
uint32 mount_status            # 1 - gimbal mounted, 0 - gimbal not mounted
uint32 is_busy
uint32 pitch_limited           # 1 - axis reached limit, 0 - no 
uint32 roll_limited            # 1 - axis reached limit, 0 - no 
uint32 yaw_limited             # 1 - axis reached limit, 0 - no 
uint32 calibrating            # 1 - calibrating, 0 - no 
uint32 prev_calibration_result # 1 - success, 0 - fail 
uint32 installed_direction     # 1 - reversed for OSMO, 0 - normal 
uint32 disabled_mvo
uint32 gear_show_unable
uint32 gyro_falut              # 1 - fault, 0 - normal 
uint32 esc_pitch_status         # 1 - Pitch data is normal, 0 - fault 
uint32 esc_roll_status          # 1 - Roll data is normal, 0 - fault 
uint32 esc_yaw_status           # 1 - Yaw data is normal , 0 - fault 
uint32 drone_data_recv          # 1 - normal , 0 - at fault 
uint32 init_unfinished         # 1 - init complete, 0 - not complete 
uint32 fw_updating             # 1 - updating, 0 - not updating

fields.name: mount_status
fields.comment: 1 - gimbal mounted, 0 - gimbal not mounted

fields.name: pitch_limited
fields.comment: 1 - axis reached limit, 0 - no

fields.name: roll_limited
fields.comment: 1 - axis reached limit, 0 - no

fields.name: yaw_limited
fields.comment: 1 - axis reached limit, 0 - no

fields.name: calibrating
fields.comment: 1 - calibrating, 0 - no

fields.name: prev_calibration_result
fields.comment: 1 - success, 0 - fail

fields.name: installed_direction
fields.comment: 1 - reversed for OSMO, 0 - normal

fields.name: gyro_falut
fields.comment: 1 - fault, 0 - normal

fields.name: esc_pitch_status
fields.comment: 1 - Pitch data is normal, 0 - fault

fields.name: esc_roll_status
fields.comment: 1 - Roll data is normal, 0 - fault

fields.name: esc_yaw_status
fields.comment: 1 - Yaw data is normal , 0 - fault

fields.name: drone_data_recv
fields.comment: 1 - normal , 0 - at fault

fields.name: init_unfinished
fields.comment: 1 - init complete, 0 - not complete

fields.name: fw_updating
fields.comment: 1 - updating, 0 - not updating

RTKYaw.description: means that the value of RTK yaw will be 90deg offset from the yaw of the aircraft.
RTKYaw.raw:
std_msgs/Header header
uint16 yaw                  # unit: deg. The RTK yaw will provide the vector from ANT1 to ANT2 as configured in DJI Assistant 2. This
                            # means that the value of RTK yaw will be 90deg offset from the yaw of the aircraft.

fields.comment: unit: deg. The RTK yaw will provide the vector from ANT1 to ANT2 as configured in DJI Assistant 2. This

CameraSetOpticalZoom.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
float32 zoom_factor

---
#response
bool success

CameraSetShutterSpeed.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1            # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint8 shutter_speed_factor       # see enum E_DjiCameraManagerShutterSpeed in dji_camera_manager.h 
                                 # potential inputs from 0 to 66 and 0xFF for unkown
---
#response
bool success

CameraSetupStreaming.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1       # please refer to enum E_DjiLiveViewCameraPosition in dji_liveview.h
uint8 camera_source 0       # please refer to enum E_DjiLiveViewCameraSource in dji_liveview.h
bool start_stop             # 0 for stop and 1 for start
bool decoded_output 1       # 0 for encoded output and 1 for decoded output
---
#response
bool success

request_fields.name: payload_index
request_fields.comment: please refer to enum E_DjiLiveViewCameraPosition in dji_liveview.h

request_fields.name: camera_source
request_fields.comment: please refer to enum E_DjiLiveViewCameraSource in dji_liveview.h

request_fields.name: decoded_output
request_fields.comment: 0 for encoded output and 1 for decoded output

CameraShootBurstPhoto.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint8 photo_burst_count     #see enum E_DjiCameraBurstCount in dji_typedef.h
---
#response
bool success

CameraShootIntervalPhoto.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1           # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint8 num_photos_to_capture     # 0:reserve 1~254:number 255:keep capturing till stop
int16 time_interval             # time interval between two captures (second)

---
#response
bool success

CameraShootSinglePhoto.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h

---
#response
bool success

CameraStopShootPhoto.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h

---
#response
bool success

GetGoHomeAltitude.raw:
#request
---
#response
uint16 altitude     # unit m
bool success

GimbalReset.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint8 reset_mode    1       # see enum E_DjiGimbalResetMode in dji_gimbal.h
---
#response
bool success

GimbalSetMode.raw:
#request
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint8 gimbal_mode           # see enum E_DjiGimbalMode in dji_typedef.h

---
#response
bool success

PerceptionStereoVisionSetup.raw:
#request
string stereo_cameras_direction        # DOWN, FRONT, REAR, UP, LEFT, RIGHT
bool start_stop             # 0 for stop and 1 for start
---
#response
bool success
string message

request_fields.name: stereo_cameras_direction
request_fields.comment: DOWN, FRONT, REAR, UP, LEFT, RIGHT

SetGoHomeAltitude.raw:
#request
uint16 altitude     # unit: m  range 20~500 m 
---
#response
bool success

SetHomeFromGPS.raw:
#request
float64 latitude        #/*!< unit: rad */
float64 longitude       #/*!< unit: rad */
---
#response
bool success

SetObstacleAvoidance.raw:
#request
bool obstacle_avoidance_on      # True: obstacle avoidance on, False, obstacle avoidance off
---
#response
bool success

request_fields.name: obstacle_avoidance_on
request_fields.comment: True: obstacle avoidance on, False, obstacle avoidance off

CameraDeleteFileByIndex.raw:
# goal
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint32 file_index
---
# result
bool success
---
# feedback

CameraDownloadFileByIndex.raw:
# goal
uint8 payload_index 1       # see enum E_DjiMountPosition in dji_typedef.h
uint32 file_index
string file_name
string file_path 

---
# result
bool success
---
# feedback
